_meta.description: Comprehensive English Excel function dictionary with aliases, signatures, use cases, pitfalls, and examples for the Excel Python Agent.

functions.name: ABS
functions.description: Returns the absolute value of a number.
pitfalls: Returns positive even for negative inputs

functions.name: ACOS
functions.description: Returns the arccosine of a number in radians.

functions.name: AGGREGATE
functions.description: Returns an aggregate in a list or database, with options to ignore errors and hidden rows.

functions.name: ASIN
functions.description: Returns the arcsine of a number in radians.

functions.name: ATAN
functions.description: Returns the arctangent of a number in radians.

functions.name: ATAN2
functions.description: Returns the arctangent from x and y coordinates.

functions.name: AVERAGE
functions.description: Returns the arithmetic mean of the arguments.

functions.name: AVERAGEIF
functions.description: Returns the average of cells that meet a single criterion.

functions.name: AVERAGEIFS
functions.description: Returns the average of cells that meet multiple criteria.
useCases: Mean score by class and grade
pitfalls: All ranges must be same size

functions.name: CEILING
functions.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest multiple of significance.
pitfalls: Number and significance must have same sign

functions.name: CEILING.MATH
functions.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest integer or multiple of significance.
useCases: Round up with control over negative behavior
pitfalls: mode controls rounding direction for negatives

functions.name: COMBIN
functions.description: Returns the number of combinations for a given number of items.

functions.name: COS
functions.description: Returns the cosine of an angle in radians.

functions.name: COUNT
functions.description: Counts the number of cells that contain numbers.

functions.name: COUNTA
functions.description: Counts the number of cells that are not empty.
pitfalls: Counts text, numbers, errors, and logicals

functions.name: COUNTBLANK
functions.description: Counts the number of empty cells in a range.
pitfalls: Cells with "" are counted as blank

functions.name: COUNTIF
functions.description: Counts the number of cells that meet a single criterion.

functions.name: COUNTIFS
functions.description: Counts cells that meet multiple criteria.
pitfalls: All ranges must be same size

functions.name: DEGREES
functions.description: Converts radians to degrees.

functions.name: EVEN
functions.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest even integer.

functions.name: EXP
functions.description: Returns e raised to the power of a given number.

functions.name: FACT
functions.description: Returns the factorial of a number.

functions.name: FLOOR
functions.description: Rounds a number down to the nearest multiple of significance.
pitfalls: Number and significance must have same sign

functions.name: FLOOR.MATH
functions.description: Rounds a number down to the nearest integer or multiple of significance.

functions.name: GCD
functions.description: Returns the greatest common divisor.
pitfalls: All arguments must be non-negative integers

functions.name: INT
functions.description: Rounds a number down to the nearest integer.

functions.name: LCM
functions.description: Returns the least common multiple.
pitfalls: All arguments must be non-negative integers

functions.name: LN
functions.description: Returns the natural logarithm of a number.

functions.name: LOG
functions.description: Returns the logarithm of a number to a specified base.

functions.name: LOG10
functions.description: Returns the base-10 logarithm of a number.

functions.name: MINVERSE
functions.description: Returns the inverse matrix for the matrix stored in an array.

functions.name: MMULT
functions.description: Returns the matrix product of two arrays.
pitfalls: Columns of array1 must equal rows of array2

functions.name: MOD
functions.description: Returns the remainder after division.
pitfalls: Result has same sign as divisor

functions.name: MROUND
functions.description: Returns a number rounded to the nearest specified multiple.
pitfalls: Number and multiple must have the same sign

functions.name: ODD
functions.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest odd integer.
pitfalls: Rounds away from zero for negatives

functions.name: PI
functions.description: Returns the value of pi (3.14159265...).

functions.name: POWER
functions.description: Returns the result of a number raised to a power.
pitfalls: Negative base with fractional power returns #NUM!

functions.name: PRODUCT
functions.description: Multiplies all the numbers given as arguments.
pitfalls: A single zero makes result zero

functions.name: QUOTIENT
functions.description: Returns the integer portion of a division.

functions.name: RADIANS
functions.description: Converts degrees to radians.

functions.name: RAND
functions.description: Returns a random number between 0 and 1.

functions.name: RANDBETWEEN
functions.description: Returns a random integer between two values inclusive.

functions.name: ROMAN
functions.description: Converts an Arabic numeral to Roman numeral text.

functions.name: ROUND
functions.description: Rounds a number to a specified number of digits.
pitfalls: Negative num_digits rounds to left of decimal

functions.name: ROUNDDOWN
functions.description: Rounds a number down toward zero.
pitfalls: Always rounds toward zero regardless of sign

functions.name: ROUNDUP
functions.description: Rounds a number up away from zero.

functions.name: SEQUENCE
functions.description: Generates a list of sequential numbers in an array.
pitfalls: Dynamic array — spills into adjacent cells

functions.name: SIGN
functions.description: Returns 1 if positive, 0 if zero, -1 if negative.

functions.name: SIN
functions.description: Returns the sine of an angle in radians.

functions.name: SQRT
functions.description: Returns the positive square root of a number.
pitfalls: Use ABS if input may be negative

functions.name: SUBTOTAL
functions.description: Returns a subtotal in a list. Function_num 1-11 include hidden rows, 101-111 ignore them.
useCases: Sum visible rows in filtered list

functions.name: SUM
functions.description: Adds all the numbers in a range of cells.
pitfalls: Ignores text and logical values in cells

functions.name: SUMIF
functions.description: Sums cells that meet a single criterion.

functions.name: SUMIFS
functions.description: Sums cells that meet multiple criteria.
useCases: Sum sales by region and quarter
pitfalls: sum_range is FIRST argument unlike SUMIF
All criteria ranges must match size

functions.name: SUMPRODUCT
functions.description: Multiplies corresponding components in arrays and returns the sum.

functions.name: TAN
functions.description: Returns the tangent of an angle in radians.
pitfalls: Undefined at odd multiples of PI/2

functions.name: TRUNC
functions.description: Truncates a number to an integer by removing the fractional part.

functions.name: CONFIDENCE.NORM
functions.description: Returns the confidence interval for a population mean using a normal distribution.

functions.name: CONFIDENCE.T
functions.description: Returns confidence interval using Student's t-distribution.
pitfalls: Better than NORM for small samples

functions.name: CORREL
functions.description: Returns the Pearson correlation coefficient between two data sets.

functions.name: COVARIANCE.P
functions.description: Returns population covariance of two data sets.

functions.name: COVARIANCE.S
functions.description: Returns sample covariance of two data sets.

functions.name: FORECAST.LINEAR
functions.description: Returns a predicted value based on a linear trend.
pitfalls: Extrapolation far from data is unreliable

functions.name: FREQUENCY
functions.description: Returns a frequency distribution as a vertical array.
pitfalls: Returns array with one more element than bins
Must be array-entered in legacy Excel

functions.name: GEOMEAN
functions.description: Returns the geometric mean of positive values.

functions.name: GROWTH
functions.description: Returns values along an exponential growth trend.
pitfalls: All y values must be positive

functions.name: HARMEAN
functions.description: Returns the harmonic mean of positive values.

functions.name: KURT
functions.description: Returns the kurtosis of a data set indicating tail heaviness.

functions.name: LARGE
functions.description: Returns the k-th largest value in a data set.
pitfalls: k must be between 1 and count

functions.name: MAX
functions.description: Returns the largest value in a set.
pitfalls: Ignores text and logicals in ranges

functions.name: MAXIFS
functions.description: Returns the maximum value among cells meeting criteria.
pitfalls: Returns 0 if no cells meet criteria

functions.name: MEDIAN
functions.description: Returns the median of the given numbers.
pitfalls: Averages two middle values for even count

functions.name: MIN
functions.description: Returns the smallest value in a set.

functions.name: MINIFS
functions.description: Returns the minimum value among cells meeting criteria.
pitfalls: Returns 0 if no cells meet criteria

functions.name: MODE.MULT
functions.description: Returns a vertical array of the most frequently occurring values.
useCases: Find all modes in multimodal data
pitfalls: Must be array-entered in legacy Excel

functions.name: MODE.SNGL
functions.description: Returns the most frequently occurring value.

functions.name: PERCENTILE.EXC
functions.description: Returns the k-th percentile using exclusive interpolation.
pitfalls: k must be between 1/(n+1) and n/(n+1)

functions.name: PERCENTILE.INC
functions.description: Returns the k-th percentile using inclusive interpolation.
pitfalls: k must be between 0 and 1 inclusive

functions.name: QUARTILE.INC
functions.description: Returns the inclusive quartile (0=min, 1=Q1, 2=median, 3=Q3, 4=max).

functions.name: RANK.AVG
functions.description: Returns the rank of a number, averaging for ties.
pitfalls: Tied values get average of their ranks

functions.name: RANK.EQ
functions.description: Returns the rank of a number, same rank for duplicates.

functions.name: SKEW
functions.description: Returns the skewness of a distribution.

functions.name: SMALL
functions.description: Returns the k-th smallest value.
pitfalls: k must be between 1 and count

functions.name: STDEV.P
functions.description: Calculates standard deviation based on the entire population.

functions.name: STDEV.S
functions.description: Estimates standard deviation based on a sample.

functions.name: TREND
functions.description: Returns values along a linear trend line.

functions.name: VAR.P
functions.description: Calculates variance based on the entire population.

functions.name: VAR.S
functions.description: Estimates variance based on a sample.

functions.name: ADDRESS
functions.description: Returns a cell reference as text.

functions.name: CHOOSE
functions.description: Returns a value from a list based on index number.

functions.name: CHOOSECOLS
functions.description: Returns specified columns from an array.

functions.name: CHOOSEROWS
functions.description: Returns specified rows from an array.

functions.name: COLUMN
functions.description: Returns the column number of a reference.
pitfalls: Omitting reference returns current cell column

functions.name: COLUMNS
functions.description: Returns the number of columns in an array or range.

functions.name: DROP
functions.description: Excludes a specified number of rows or columns from an array.

functions.name: EXPAND
functions.description: Expands an array to specified dimensions.

functions.name: FILTER
functions.description: Filters a range based on criteria you define.
pitfalls: Returns #CALC! if no matches and no if_empty

functions.name: FORMULATEXT
functions.description: Returns the formula in a cell as text.
pitfalls: Returns #N/A if cell has no formula

functions.name: HLOOKUP
functions.description: Searches for a value in the top row and returns a value from the same column in a specified row.

functions.name: HSTACK
functions.description: Appends arrays horizontally (side by side).
pitfalls: Arrays must have same number of rows

functions.name: HYPERLINK
functions.description: Creates a clickable hyperlink.
pitfalls: Can link to files, URLs, or cell references

functions.name: INDEX
functions.description: Returns the value at a given position in a range or array.
pitfalls: Row and column numbers are relative to the array

functions.name: INDIRECT
functions.description: Returns a reference indicated by a text string.
pitfalls: Does not work across closed workbooks

functions.name: LOOKUP
functions.description: Looks up a value in a one-row or one-column range.

functions.name: MATCH
functions.description: Returns the relative position of an item in a range.
pitfalls: match_type 0 = exact, 1 = less than, -1 = greater than

functions.name: OFFSET
functions.description: Returns a reference offset from a starting point.

functions.name: ROW
functions.description: Returns the row number of a reference.
pitfalls: Omitting reference returns current cell row

functions.name: ROWS
functions.description: Returns the number of rows in an array or range.

functions.name: SORT
functions.description: Sorts the contents of a range or array.

functions.name: SORTBY
functions.description: Sorts a range based on values in a corresponding range.
pitfalls: by_array must have same rows as array

functions.name: TAKE
functions.description: Returns a specified number of rows or columns from an array.
useCases: Get last N rows with negative

functions.name: TOCOL
functions.description: Returns an array as a single column.

functions.name: TOROW
functions.description: Returns an array as a single row.

functions.name: TRANSPOSE
functions.description: Transposes rows and columns of an array.
pitfalls: Dynamic array in 365, array formula in legacy

functions.name: UNIQUE
functions.description: Returns unique values from a range.
pitfalls: exactly_once=TRUE returns values appearing only once

functions.name: VLOOKUP
functions.description: Searches for a value in the first column and returns a value from a specified column.
useCases: Look up price by product code

functions.name: VSTACK
functions.description: Appends arrays vertically (stacked).
pitfalls: Arrays must have same number of columns

functions.name: WRAPCOLS
functions.description: Wraps a row or column vector after a specified number of elements into columns.

functions.name: WRAPROWS
functions.description: Wraps a row or column vector after a specified number of elements into rows.

functions.name: XLOOKUP
functions.description: Searches a range or array and returns an item from a corresponding range.

functions.name: XMATCH
functions.description: Returns the relative position of a value in an array with advanced match options.

functions.name: ARRAYTOTEXT
functions.description: Returns an array as a text string.

functions.name: CHAR
functions.description: Returns the character specified by a code number.
pitfalls: Different on Mac for some codes

functions.name: CLEAN
functions.description: Removes all non-printable characters from text.
pitfalls: Does not remove all Unicode whitespace

functions.name: CODE
functions.description: Returns the numeric code for the first character in a text string.
pitfalls: Returns code of first character only

functions.name: CONCAT
functions.description: Joins text from multiple ranges or strings.
pitfalls: No delimiter — use TEXTJOIN for that

functions.name: CONCATENATE
functions.description: Joins two or more text strings into one string.

functions.name: DOLLAR
functions.description: Converts a number to text in currency format.

functions.name: EXACT
functions.description: Checks whether two text strings are identical (case-sensitive).

functions.name: FIND
functions.description: Finds one text string within another (case-sensitive).

functions.name: FIXED
functions.description: Formats a number as text with a fixed number of decimals.

functions.name: LEFT
functions.description: Returns the leftmost characters from a text string.

functions.name: LEN
functions.description: Returns the number of characters in a text string.

functions.name: LOWER
functions.description: Converts text to lowercase.

functions.name: MID
functions.description: Returns a specific number of characters from a text string starting at a specified position.

functions.name: NUMBERVALUE
functions.description: Converts text to number with locale control.
pitfalls: Must specify separators for non-default locale

functions.name: PROPER
functions.description: Capitalizes the first letter of each word.

functions.name: REPLACE
functions.description: Replaces characters at a specific position.

functions.name: REPT
functions.description: Repeats text a given number of times.

functions.name: RIGHT
functions.description: Returns the rightmost characters from a text string.

functions.name: SEARCH
functions.description: Finds text within another string (case-insensitive, allows wildcards).

functions.name: SUBSTITUTE
functions.description: Substitutes new text for old text in a string.

functions.name: TEXT
functions.description: Formats a number as text with a specified format.
pitfalls: Format codes follow Excel number format syntax

functions.name: TEXTAFTER
functions.description: Returns text that occurs after a specified delimiter.

functions.name: TEXTBEFORE
functions.description: Returns text before a specified delimiter.

functions.name: TEXTJOIN
functions.description: Joins text from multiple ranges with a delimiter.

functions.name: TEXTSPLIT
functions.description: Splits text into rows or columns by delimiter.

functions.name: TRIM
functions.description: Removes all spaces from text except single spaces between words.
pitfalls: Does not remove non-breaking spaces — use SUBSTITUTE for those

functions.name: UPPER
functions.description: Converts text to uppercase.

functions.name: VALUE
functions.description: Converts a text string that represents a number to a number.
useCases: Convert text numbers to real numbers
pitfalls: Returns #VALUE! if text cannot be converted

functions.name: VALUETOTEXT
functions.description: Returns text from any value.
useCases: Convert any value to text representation

functions.name: DATE
functions.description: Creates a date from year, month, and day components.
pitfalls: Month > 12 rolls over to next year

functions.name: DATEDIF
functions.description: Calculates the difference between two dates in specified units.
pitfalls: Undocumented function — not in function wizard
Units: Y, M, D, MD, YM, YD

functions.name: DATEVALUE
functions.description: Converts a date in text format to a serial number.
pitfalls: Returns serial number not formatted date

functions.name: DAY
functions.description: Returns the day of the month (1-31).

functions.name: DAYS
functions.description: Returns the number of days between two dates.

functions.name: DAYS360
functions.description: Returns the number of days between two dates based on a 360-day year.

functions.name: EDATE
functions.description: Returns a date that is a specified number of months before or after a start date.
pitfalls: Preserves day of month when possible

functions.name: EOMONTH
functions.description: Returns the last day of the month, a specified number of months from start.
pitfalls: months=0 returns end of current month

functions.name: HOUR
functions.description: Returns the hour of a time value (0-23).

functions.name: ISOWEEKNUM
functions.description: Returns the ISO 8601 week number of the year.

functions.name: MINUTE
functions.description: Returns the minutes of a time value (0-59).

functions.name: MONTH
functions.description: Returns the month of a date (1-12).

functions.name: NETWORKDAYS
functions.description: Returns the number of whole working days between two dates.
pitfalls: holidays is optional range of dates to exclude

functions.name: NETWORKDAYS.INTL
functions.description: Returns working days with custom weekend definition.
useCases: Calculate business days for non-standard work weeks
pitfalls: weekend string or code defines non-work days

functions.name: NOW
functions.description: Returns the current date and time.
pitfalls: Not fixed — use Ctrl+; for static

functions.name: SECOND
functions.description: Returns the seconds of a time value (0-59).

functions.name: TIME
functions.description: Creates a time from hour, minute, and second components.

functions.name: TIMEVALUE
functions.description: Converts a time in text format to a decimal number.

functions.name: TODAY
functions.description: Returns today's date.

functions.name: WEEKDAY
functions.description: Returns the day of the week as a number.

functions.name: WEEKNUM
functions.description: Returns the week number of the year.

functions.name: WORKDAY
functions.description: Returns a date that is a specified number of working days from start.

functions.name: WORKDAY.INTL
functions.description: Returns a date offset by working days with custom weekends.

functions.name: YEAR
functions.description: Returns the year of a date.

functions.name: YEARFRAC
functions.description: Returns the year fraction between two dates.

functions.name: AND
functions.description: Returns TRUE if all arguments are TRUE.

functions.name: BYCOL
functions.description: Applies a LAMBDA to each column and returns an array of results.

functions.name: BYROW
functions.description: Applies a LAMBDA to each row and returns an array of results.

functions.name: FALSE
functions.description: Returns the logical value FALSE.

functions.name: IF
functions.description: Returns one value if a condition is TRUE, another if FALSE.
pitfalls: Avoid deeply nested IFs — use IFS or SWITCH

functions.name: IFERROR
functions.description: Returns value_if_error if the formula results in an error, otherwise returns the formula result.
pitfalls: Catches ALL errors — may hide real problems

functions.name: IFNA
functions.description: Returns value_if_na only if formula results in #N/A, otherwise returns formula result.

functions.name: IFS
functions.description: Checks multiple conditions and returns the first TRUE result.
pitfalls: No default value — add TRUE as last test

functions.name: LAMBDA
functions.description: Creates custom reusable functions.
pitfalls: Name in Name Manager for reuse

functions.name: LET
functions.description: Assigns names to calculation results to improve readability and performance.
pitfalls: Names are scoped to the formula

functions.name: MAP
functions.description: Returns an array formed by mapping each value to a new value via LAMBDA.
pitfalls: All arrays must be same size

functions.name: MAKEARRAY
functions.description: Returns a calculated array of specified size by applying LAMBDA.

functions.name: NOT
functions.description: Reverses the logic of its argument.

functions.name: OR
functions.description: Returns TRUE if any argument is TRUE.
pitfalls: Returns TRUE at first TRUE found

functions.name: REDUCE
functions.description: Reduces an array to an accumulated value using LAMBDA.

functions.name: SCAN
functions.description: Scans an array and returns an array of intermediate accumulated values.

functions.name: SWITCH
functions.description: Evaluates an expression against a list of values and returns the first match.
useCases: Replace nested IFs for equality checks

functions.name: TRUE
functions.description: Returns the logical value TRUE.

functions.name: XOR
functions.description: Returns TRUE if an odd number of arguments are TRUE.

functions.name: ACCRINT
functions.signature: ACCRINT(issue, first_interest, settlement, rate, par, frequency, [basis])
functions.description: Returns the accrued interest for a security that pays periodic interest.

functions.name: CUMIPMT
functions.signature: CUMIPMT(rate, nper, pv, start_period, end_period, type)
functions.description: Returns the cumulative interest paid between two periods.

functions.name: CUMPRINC
functions.signature: CUMPRINC(rate, nper, pv, start_period, end_period, type)
functions.description: Returns the cumulative principal paid between two periods.

functions.name: DB
functions.description: Returns the depreciation using the fixed-declining balance method.
pitfalls: First and last periods are partial

functions.name: DDB
functions.description: Returns the depreciation using the double-declining balance method.

functions.name: DURATION
functions.description: Returns the Macaulay duration of a bond.

functions.name: EFFECT
functions.description: Returns the effective annual interest rate.
pitfalls: npery is compounding periods per year

functions.name: FV
functions.description: Returns the future value of an investment.
pitfalls: pmt is payment per period (negative for outflows)

functions.name: IPMT
functions.description: Returns the interest payment for a specific period.
pitfalls: per must be between 1 and nper

functions.name: IRR
functions.description: Returns the internal rate of return for a series of cash flows.
pitfalls: Values must contain at least one positive and one negative

functions.name: MIRR
functions.description: Returns the modified internal rate of return with separate financing and reinvestment rates.
useCases: Compare projects with different reinvestment assumptions

functions.name: NOMINAL
functions.description: Returns the nominal annual interest rate from effective rate.
pitfalls: npery is compounding periods per year

functions.name: NPER
functions.description: Returns the number of periods for an investment.
useCases: How long to pay off loan
pitfalls: Returns number of periods, not years

functions.name: NPV
functions.description: Returns the net present value of a series of future cash flows.
pitfalls: Assumes cash flows at END of each period
Initial investment should be added separately: =-cost+NPV(...)

functions.name: PMT
functions.description: Returns the periodic payment for a loan.
pitfalls: rate must match period (monthly rate for monthly payments)

functions.name: PPMT
functions.description: Returns the principal payment for a specific period.
pitfalls: per must be between 1 and nper

functions.name: PRICE
functions.signature: PRICE(settlement, maturity, rate, yld, redemption, frequency, [basis])
functions.description: Returns the price per $100 face value of a bond.

functions.name: PV
functions.description: Returns the present value of an investment.
pitfalls: Returns negative when pmt is positive

functions.name: RATE
functions.description: Returns the interest rate per period.

functions.name: SLN
functions.description: Returns the straight-line depreciation for one period.

functions.name: SYD
functions.description: Returns the sum-of-years digits depreciation for a specified period.

functions.name: XIRR
functions.description: Returns the internal rate of return for irregular cash flows.

functions.name: XNPV
functions.description: Returns the net present value for irregular cash flows.

functions.name: YIELD
functions.signature: YIELD(settlement, maturity, rate, pr, redemption, frequency, [basis])
functions.description: Returns the yield on a security that pays periodic interest.

functions.name: CELL
functions.description: Returns information about the formatting, location, or contents of a cell.
pitfalls: info_type options: address, col, color, contents, filename, format, etc.

functions.name: ERROR.TYPE
functions.description: Returns a number corresponding to an error type.

functions.name: INFO
functions.description: Returns information about the current operating environment.
pitfalls: type_text: directory, numfile, origin, osversion, recalc, release, system

functions.name: ISBLANK
functions.description: Returns TRUE if the value is blank.

functions.name: ISERR
functions.description: Returns TRUE if value is any error except #N/A.
pitfalls: Does NOT catch #N/A — use ISERROR for that

functions.name: ISERROR
functions.description: Returns TRUE if value is any error.

functions.name: ISEVEN
functions.description: Returns TRUE if the number is even.

functions.name: ISFORMULA
functions.description: Returns TRUE if the cell contains a formula.
pitfalls: Returns TRUE for any formula including ="text"

functions.name: ISLOGICAL
functions.description: Returns TRUE if the value is a logical value (TRUE or FALSE).
pitfalls: Text "TRUE" returns FALSE — must be actual logical

functions.name: ISNA
functions.description: Returns TRUE if value is #N/A error.

functions.name: ISNONTEXT
functions.description: Returns TRUE if value is not text.
pitfalls: Numbers, logicals, errors all return TRUE

functions.name: ISNUMBER
functions.description: Returns TRUE if value is a number.
pitfalls: Dates are numbers — ISNUMBER returns TRUE for dates

functions.name: ISODD
functions.description: Returns TRUE if the number is odd.

functions.name: ISREF
functions.description: Returns TRUE if value is a reference.
pitfalls: Tests if the argument evaluates to a reference

functions.name: ISTEXT
functions.description: Returns TRUE if value is text.
pitfalls: Numbers formatted as text return TRUE

functions.name: N
functions.description: Returns a value converted to a number.

functions.name: NA
functions.description: Returns the error value #N/A.

functions.name: SHEET
functions.description: Returns the sheet number of the referenced sheet.
pitfalls: Omit value for current sheet number

functions.name: SHEETS
functions.description: Returns the number of sheets in a reference.
pitfalls: Omit reference for total sheets in workbook

functions.name: TYPE
functions.description: Returns the type of value: 1=number, 2=text, 4=logical, 16=error, 64=array, 128=compound.
pitfalls: Returns number code not text name

functions.name: BIN2DEC
functions.description: Converts a binary number to decimal.

functions.name: BIN2HEX
functions.description: Converts a binary number to hexadecimal.

functions.name: BITAND
functions.description: Returns the bitwise AND of two numbers.

functions.name: BITOR
functions.description: Returns the bitwise OR of two numbers.

functions.name: BITXOR
functions.description: Returns the bitwise XOR of two numbers.

functions.name: COMPLEX
functions.description: Converts real and imaginary coefficients into a complex number.

functions.name: CONVERT
functions.description: Converts a number from one measurement system to another.

functions.name: DEC2BIN
functions.description: Converts a decimal number to binary.

functions.name: DEC2HEX
functions.description: Converts a decimal number to hexadecimal.

functions.name: DEC2OCT
functions.description: Converts a decimal number to octal.

functions.name: DELTA
functions.description: Tests whether two values are equal. Returns 1 if equal, 0 if not.

functions.name: GESTEP
functions.description: Returns 1 if number >= step, otherwise 0.

functions.name: HEX2DEC
functions.description: Converts a hexadecimal number to decimal.

functions.name: IMABS
functions.description: Returns the absolute value (modulus) of a complex number.
pitfalls: Input must be complex number text

functions.name: IMAGINARY
functions.description: Returns the imaginary coefficient of a complex number.

functions.name: IMREAL
functions.description: Returns the real coefficient of a complex number.

functions.name: OCT2DEC
functions.description: Converts an octal number to decimal.

functions.name: DAVERAGE
functions.description: Returns the average of values in a column of a list/database matching criteria.
pitfalls: Criteria must be in range with header row
Field can be column header text or number

functions.name: DCOUNT
functions.description: Counts cells containing numbers in a database matching criteria.
pitfalls: Only counts numbers — use DCOUNTA for all

functions.name: DCOUNTA
functions.description: Counts non-blank cells in a database matching criteria.

functions.name: DGET
functions.description: Returns a single value from a database matching criteria.

functions.name: DMAX
functions.description: Returns the maximum value in a database matching criteria.

functions.name: DMIN
functions.description: Returns the minimum value in a database matching criteria.
pitfalls: Same criteria format as other D-functions

functions.name: DPRODUCT
functions.description: Multiplies values in a database matching criteria.
pitfalls: Rarely used — specific to compound factor calculations

functions.name: DSTDEV
functions.description: Estimates standard deviation of a sample in a database matching criteria.

functions.name: DSTDEVP
functions.description: Calculates population standard deviation in a database matching criteria.

functions.name: DSUM
functions.description: Sums values in a database matching criteria.
pitfalls: Criteria in separate range with headers

functions.name: DVAR
functions.description: Estimates variance of a sample in a database matching criteria.

functions.name: DVARP
functions.description: Calculates population variance in a database matching criteria.

functions.name: ENCODEURL
functions.description: URL-encodes a text string.
pitfalls: Returns text with special characters encoded

functions.name: IMAGE
functions.description: Inserts an image into a cell from a URL.

functions.name: STOCKHISTORY
functions.description: Retrieves historical stock price data.

functions.name: WEBSERVICE
functions.description: Returns data from a web service.
pitfalls: May be blocked by security settings

functions.name: FILTERXML
functions.description: Returns specific data from XML content using XPath.
